name: Outlook Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are a biopharmaceutical company that has developed ONS-5010/LYTENAVA TM as the first ophthalmic formulation of bevacizumab approved by the European Commission in the European Union, or EU, and the Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency, or MHRA, in the United Kingdom, or UK, for use in adults for the treatment of wet age-related macular degeneration, or wet AMD. In June 2025, we launched directly into the initial markets of Germany and the UK. Additionally, our Bi...
